name: assets-find-built-in
title: Assets / Find (Built-in)
description: Search the built-in assets of the Unity Editor located in the built-in resources: Resources/unity_builtin_extra. Doesn't support GUIDs since built-in assets do not have them.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the asset to filter by.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of the asset to filter by. Schema: "Material" or "Shader" or "Texture2D" etc. (Unity asset type name)

parameters.name: maxResults
parameters.description: Maximum number of assets to return. If the number of found assets exceeds this limit, the result will be truncated.
